allow: Bash(.venv/Scripts/python.exe -c "import json; d=json.load\(open\(''travel_finnmark_results.json'',''r'',encoding=''utf-8''\)\); [print\(f""{r[''name''][:30]:30} pages={r[''pages'']} issues={r[''issues'']} crit={r[''critical'']} serious={r[''serious'']}""\) for r in d]")

PowerShell($r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "https://thaidispos.com/" -UseBasicParsing -UserAgent "Mozilla/5.0 \(Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64\) AppleWebKit/537.36"; $r.Content.Length; $r.Content.Substring\(0, [Math]::Min\(15000, $r.Content.Length\)\))

PowerShell($r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "https://thaidispos.com/dispensaries/wonderland-bangkok" -UseBasicParsing -UserAgent "Mozilla/5.0"; $start = $r.Content.IndexOf\('"@type":"LocalBusiness"'\); if \($start -lt 0\) { $start = $r.Content.IndexOf\('"@type":"Place"'\) }; if \($start -lt 0\) { $start = $r.Content.IndexOf\('application/ld+json'\) }; "JSON-LD start: $start"; if \($start -ge 0\) { $r.Content.Substring\($start, [Math]::Min\(4000, $r.Content.Length - $start\)\) })
PowerShell(Get-ChildItem -Path . -Directory | Where-Object { $_.Name -in @\('venv','env','.venv','.env'\) } | Select-Object Name; Test-Path requirements.txt; Get-Content requirements.txt)
PowerShell(py -c "import requests; print\('requests:', requests.__version__\); import bs4; print\('bs4:', bs4.__version__\)")

PowerShell($rows = Import-Csv scrapers/thailand_cannabis/data/weed_th.csv; $ud = $rows | Where-Object { $_.city -match 'Udon Thani' }; "Udon Thani shop count: $\($ud.Count\)"; "--- first 5 ---"; $ud | Select-Object -First 5 | ForEach-Object { "$\($_.source_id\) | $\($_.name\)" })
